title: Deal Chat
description: Use the persistent deal assistant to ask context-aware questions, explore AI responses grounded in deal data, and see how conversations evolve across multiple exchanges.

steps.narration: Every deal page includes a persistent assistant docked at the bottom of the screen. It shows a greeting and quick-action suggestions based on your current page context.
Click the assistant bar to expand it. The conversation panel opens showing any previous messages. Here you can see an earlier exchange where we asked about the Meridian Dynamics deal status.

The assistant's response summarized the deal: it's currently open, created in February, with James Mitchell as collaborator, and a pre-call briefing plus two Touch 1 sessions completed. All grounded in real deal data.
Now a new question has been asked about key pain points for the next meeting. The assistant analyzes the deal context and responds with specific, actionable insights.

The assistant identified three pain points: legacy system integration bottlenecks, data silos between marketing and sales teams, and infrastructure scalability concerns for Q3 growth. Each is specific to Meridian Dynamics.
The conversation continues with a knowledge base query about proposals sent to similar companies. The assistant searches across your organization's past work to surface relevant precedents.
The knowledge base response surfaces relevant past proposals, their outcomes, and what approaches worked. This helps you build on proven strategies rather than starting from scratch.
A call transcript has been uploaded and analyzed. The assistant parsed the discussion and extracted key points that are now available as context for future questions and artifact generation.
The parsed transcript reveals discussion points from the meeting. These insights are now part of the deal's knowledge base and will inform future AI-generated content.
An important insight has been saved as a deal note. The assistant offers to bind it to a specific touch so the insight feeds into future artifact generation automatically.
You can bind notes to any touch or leave them unbound for general context. Notes and bindings create a feedback loop between your conversations and the artifacts AtlusDeck generates.
The deal assistant is always available at the bottom of every deal page. Whether you're on the overview, briefing, or touch tabs, your conversation thread persists across all sections.
